mission.title: distribution: proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`
mission.description: proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current distribution deployment
steps.description:
Verify your distribution version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
helm list -n distribution 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working distribution installation.

steps.title: Review distribution configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
kubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution
```
tl;dr: This issue is a reopen of https://github.com/distribution/distribution/issues/2374 with more insights. In https://github.com/distribution/distribution/pull/4293 we fixed the predominant root cause for the issue - the non-graceful shutdown.

steps.title: Apply the fix for proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`
steps.description:
I am closing this issue as it _appears_ to be fixed in [3.1.0](https://github.com/distribution/distribution) with https://github.com/distribution/distribution/pull/4624.
I will reopen if we observe it again with 3.1.0.
```yaml
# ...
2024-10-03 15:43:54	time="2024-10-03T15:43:54.749227425Z" level=info msg="stopping server gracefully. Draining connections for 25s" go.version=go1.22.4 instance.id=5731de6f-05af-43a1-b44b-a3c1bf25e067 service=registry version=3.0.0-beta.1
2024-10-03 15:43:54	time="2024-10-03T15:43:54.750578013Z" level=fatal msg="error writing scheduler state: filesystem: write /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json: no space left on device"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
kubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I am closing this issue as it _appears_ to be fixed in [3.1.0](https://github.com/distribution/distribution) with https://github.com/distribution/distribution/pull/4624.
I will reopen if we observe it again with 3.1.0.
codeSnippets:
# ...
2024-10-03 15:43:54	time="2024-10-03T15:43:54.749227425Z" level=info msg="stopping server gracefully. Draining connections for 25s" go.version=go1.22.4 instance.id=5731de6f-05af-43a1-b44b-a3c1bf25e067 service=registry version=3.0.0-beta.1
2024-10-03 15:43:54	time="2024-10-03T15:43:54.750578013Z" level=fatal msg="error writing scheduler state: filesystem: write /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json: no space left on device"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with distribution installed or the issue environment reproducible.
